items.original_title: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
items.title_en: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
items.summary_en: OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推出了小型企业ChatGPT计划，旨在帮助创业者构建AI技能并自动化工作。

items.original_title: OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
items.title_en: OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
items.summary_en: OpenAI and Hugging Face share early findings from a security incident during AI model evaluation, highlighting advanced cyber capabilities and lessons for defenders.
items.title_zh: OpenAI与Hugging Face合作应对模型评估期间的安全事件
items.summary_zh: OpenAI与Hugging Face合作，针对模型评估期间的安全事件共享初步调查结果，展示先进的网络安全能力。

items.original_title: Microsoft and Mistral strike multi-billion-dollar deal to build AI infrastructure across Europe
items.title_en: Microsoft and Mistral strike multi-billion-dollar deal to build AI infrastructure across Europe
items.summary_en: Microsoft and Mistral are expanding their strategic partnership with a multi-billion-dollar deal to build out AI infrastructure in Europe. The article Microsoft and Mistral strike multi-billion-dollar deal to build AI infrastructure across Europe appeared first on The Decoder .
items.title_zh: 微软与Mistral达成数十亿美元合作共建AI基础设施
items.summary_zh: 微软与Mistral达成数十亿美元协议，计划在欧洲构建AI基础设施，进一步推动AI行业的发展。

items.original_title: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
items.title_en: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
items.summary_en: Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber, but the continued absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro raises fresh questions about its AI strategy.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌推出了三款新的Gemini模型，但尚未发布Gemini 3.5 Pro，令其AI战略受到质疑。

items.original_title: An AI system helped Pakistani judges clear massive backlogs at $38.50 return per dollar invested
items.title_en: An AI system helped Pakistani judges clear massive backlogs at $38.50 return per dollar invested
items.summary_en: A field experiment with 1,559 Pakistani judges found that the AI assistant JudgeGPT boosted case resolution by 6.3 percent. The catch: only judges who got hands-on training saw gains. Without it, the effect mostly disappeared. The researchers estimate a return of up to $38.50 per dollar invested. The article An AI sys…
items.title_zh: AI系统帮助巴基斯坦法官清理积压案件，投资回报率达每花1美元回报38.5美元
items.summary_zh: 在一项针对1559名巴基斯坦法官的实地实验中，AI助手JudgeGPT将案件解决率提升了6.3%。

items.original_title: US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft
items.title_en: US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft
items.summary_en: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. could sanction Chinese open AI models over alleged IP theft, expanding the Trump administration's campaign to slow China's AI advances.
items.title_zh: 美国威胁对中国AI模型实施制裁以应对知识产权盗窃
items.summary_zh: 美国财政部长表示，因涉嫌知识产权盗窃，美国可能对中国的开放AI模型实施制裁，旨在减缓中国的AI进展。

items.original_title: Meta is testing an AI bedtime story app for people with no imagination
items.title_en: Meta is testing an AI bedtime story app for people with no imagination
items.summary_en: At last, a tech company has found a way to outsource humanity's oldest pastime: using our imaginations.
items.title_zh: Meta测试AI睡前故事应用，旨在帮助缺乏想象力的人
items.summary_zh: Meta正在测试一款为缺乏想象力的人士准备的AI睡前故事应用，旨在改善用户的想象力体验。

items.original_title: Copilot users can now see AI credits used per billing cycle
items.title_en: Copilot users can now see AI credits used per billing cycle
items.summary_en: Copilot Business and Copilot Enterprise users can now see how many AI credits they’ve used this billing cycle, even without an individual budget. Find this on your GitHub Copilot usage… The post Copilot users can now see AI credits used per billing cycle appeared first on The GitHub Blog .
items.title_zh: Copilot用户可查看AI积分使用情况
items.summary_zh: Copilot用户现在可以查看每个账单周期使用的AI积分，即使没有个别预算。
